decision: Keep release-grade live-detector-evidence gate at warning. Rebuilt Linux smoke now passes UA, UA-CH fullVersionList on SannySoft, BrowserLeaks Client Hints, Pixelscan fingerprint-check, and iphey, webdriver, locale/timezone, screen, storage quota, hardware, WebGL configured values, and repeat-consistent sanitized Canvas 2D probe hashes, and captures unscored WebAudio and FontFaceSet probes. Full headed/proxy BrowserLeaks/Pixelscan/iphey/BrowserScan/CreepJS/SannySoft matrix remains incomplete.

surfaces.evidence: Packaged Linux SannySoft/CDP smoke using fingerprint.user_agent config reported navigator.webdriver=false and configured Chromium UA without HeadlessChrome.

Rebuilt packaged Linux runtime passed SannySoft/CDP UA-CH smoke, BrowserLeaks Client Hints page smoke, Pixelscan fingerprint-check UA-CH smoke, and iphey UA-CH smoke. BrowserLeaks/Pixelscan/iphey observed navigator.userAgentData platform=Linux, platformVersion=6.8.0, architecture=x86, bitness=64, mobile=false, model empty, wow64=false, and fullVersionList containing Chromium 150.0.7871.101.
SannySoft local dogfood rerun observed MacIntel platform on macOS host; release-grade cross-platform persona coherence remains unproven.
Linux packaged SannySoft/CDP smoke reported Intl timezone Asia/Taipei with wrapper TZ propagation plus renderer switch propagation.
Linux packaged SannySoft/CDP smoke reported zh-TW, zh;q=0.9, en;q=0.8 language list.
Packaged Linux SannySoft/CDP smoke collected by scripts/detector_harness.py reported screen 1920x1080, available screen 1920x1040, and DPR=1 from configured fingerprint profile.
Linux packaged SannySoft/CDP smoke reported hardwareConcurrency=8 and deviceMemory=8 from configured fingerprint profile.

Packaged Linux SannySoft/CDP collector rendered a deterministic 64x32 Canvas 2D probe twice from fresh container launches with fingerprint.canvas_noise=23; sanitized data_url_sha256 and image_data_sha256 matched across repeats, and no raw data URL or pixel payload is committed.
Linux packaged SannySoft/CDP smoke reported Intel Inc. / Intel Iris OpenGL Engine from configured fingerprint profile.

Packaged Linux SannySoft/CDP smoke collected by scripts/detector_harness.py rendered OfflineAudioContext length 44100 at sampleRate 44100 and recorded deterministic sanitized sum/sumAbs values; BrowserLeaks/CreepJS audio fingerprint comparison remains required.

Packaged Linux SannySoft/CDP smoke with fingerprint.fonts allowlist reported document.fonts.check() available=true for sampled desktop font families. Font metrics, glyph raster, and BrowserLeaks/CreepJS/Pixelscan font comparison remain required.
CreepJS local dogfood smoke after WebRTC prefs/flag showed host connection blocked, foundation/ip unsupported/blocked, and stun connection blocked; no candidate IP literal was committed.
SannySoft local dogfood rerun reported Permissions prompt and HEADCHR_PERMISSIONS ok; broader CreepJS/BrowserLeaks permissions coverage remains absent.
Packaged Linux SannySoft/CDP smoke collected by scripts/detector_harness.py reported navigator.storage.estimate quota 8589934592 bytes for configured 8192 MiB storage quota.
Linux packaged SannySoft/CDP smoke reported navigator.webdriver=false and WebDriver row missing/passed; broader CreepJS/headed headless-resistance evidence remains required.
No proxy detector run was executed.
BrowseForge dogfood used distinct profile IDs and isolated same-origin localStorage across two sessions.
Linux x64 Docker SannySoft smoke now exists, in addition to macOS dogfood; Windows and headed Linux/macOS detector matrix remains absent.
